About

Engineering Intelligent
Systems

I'm Swayam R Sabanavar, a Mechatronics Engineering student at Acharya Institute of Technology, Bengaluru, maintaining a CGPA of 9.32. My work sits at the intersection of AI, robotics, and industrial automation — where intelligent algorithms meet physical systems.

From building a patent-filed 18-DOF hexapod rescue robot to developing a production-grade AI optical inspection platform, I engineer systems that solve real industrial and emergency-response challenges. Currently gaining hands-on industry experience as an intern at FANUC India, working on industrial robot programming, vision systems, and automation workcells.

My engineering philosophy: build systems that are not just technically sound, but production-ready — reliable, scalable, and deployable in real environments.

Project 02

PCB AI Inspection System

Intelligent Industrial AOI Platform

An AI-powered Automated Optical Inspection platform developed for intelligent PCB defect analysis. Combines YOLOv8 computer vision with MiniCPM-V semantic reasoning, delivering an industrial-grade inspection pipeline with real-time dashboard, automated PDF reporting, and full inspection history management.

  • YOLOv8 PCB defect localization & bounding box detection
  • MiniCPM-V Vision-Language semantic AI analysis
  • Anti-hallucination industrial confidence filtering
  • Industrial AOI overlay with defect annotation
  • Real-time inspection dashboard with live metrics
  • SQLite inspection database & history management
  • Automated PDF report generation per inspection
  • Analytics dashboard with defect trend visualization
Python Flask YOLOv8 MiniCPM-V OpenCV SQLite HTML/CSS

Deep Dive

PCB Inspection Case Study

01 / Problem Statement
Manual Inspection at Scale is Broken

Traditional PCB quality control relies on human visual inspection — a process that is slow, inconsistent, and fundamentally unscalable. Human inspectors miss up to 20% of defects under fatigue, and throughput bottlenecks downstream production lines. As PCB complexity grows, manual inspection becomes the weakest link in smart manufacturing. The challenge: build an AI system accurate enough for industrial deployment, fast enough for inline integration, and intelligent enough to reason — not just detect.

02 / System Architecture
Hybrid AI + VLM Inspection Pipeline
PCB Image Upload
↓
YOLOv8 Defect Detection
↓
OpenCV Annotation Overlay
↓
MiniCPM-V Semantic Reasoning
↓
SQLite Database Storage
↓
Analytics Dashboard
↓
Automated PDF Report
03 / Live Dashboard — AI Vision-Language Analysis
MiniCPM-V Semantic Output
VLM Analysis Panel
04 / Engineering Challenges
Solving Hard AI Production Problems
  • AI Hallucination Reduction: Implemented industrial confidence thresholding to filter out low-confidence VLM outputs that could mislead engineers
  • Hybrid Pipeline Orchestration: Synchronising YOLOv8 bounding box outputs with MiniCPM-V context window required careful image serialization
  • Real-time Rendering: Designed Flask backend with streaming responses to deliver live dashboard updates without page reloads
  • Inspection Integrity: Each inspection is session-keyed with UUID, preventing data collision in concurrent use scenarios
  • Report Automation: PDF generation triggered automatically post-inspection with annotated images, defect tables, and AI summaries
05 / Future Roadmap
Next-Generation Inspection Intelligence

RAG Memory

Historical defect pattern retrieval for contextual AI reasoning

Operator Feedback

Closed-loop correction system for continuous model improvement

Retraining Pipeline

Auto-triggered retraining from confirmed defect annotations

Edge AI Deploy

Optimised inference for embedded hardware on production floor

Smart Factory

ERP/MES integration for fully automated quality management

Project 01

Hexa-bot — Emergency AI
Surveillance & Rescue

Autonomous Multi-Terrain Robotic Platform

Patent
FILED

An AI-powered six-legged autonomous robotic platform designed for emergency surveillance, hazardous-environment monitoring, and intelligent rescue operations. Built from the ground up — custom 3D-printed frame, 18 MG996R servos, Raspberry Pi 5B compute, LiDAR mapping, thermal imaging, and YOLOv8 real-time human detection.

6
Legs
18
DOF
92%
Detection Accuracy
<1s
Response Time
  • 18-DOF adaptive tripod/bipod gait locomotion
  • YOLOv8 real-time human & object detection
  • LiDAR-based 2D environmental mapping
  • Thermal sensing for heat-signature detection
  • OpenCV visual processing pipeline
  • Edge AI inference on Raspberry Pi 5B
  • Modular 3D-printed structural design
  • 20–25% energy efficiency improvement over prototype
